LanguageData.MakeAmmo_Catapult_BoulderBulk.label: cut stone chunk into boulder x5
LanguageData.MakeAmmo_Catapult_BoulderBulk.descriptio: Cuts a stone chunk down to size to be thrown by a siege engine.
LanguageData.MakeAmmo_Catapult_TarBoulder.label: tar a stone boulder
LanguageData.MakeAmmo_Catapult_TarBoulder.description: Cuts a stone chunk down to size and covers in tar to be thrown by a siege engine.
LanguageData.MakeAmmo_Catapult_TarBoulderBulk.label: tar a stone boulder x5
LanguageData.MakeAmmo_Catapult_TarBoulderBulk.descrip: Cuts a stone chunk down to size and covers in tar to be thrown by a siege engine.
